title: State machine verification: Rust lichen-rpl
description:
Add state machine verification to RPL routing implementation.

RPL has complex state machines:
- DODAG state (joined, root, leaf, floating)
- Trickle timer state
- Route entry state (fresh, stale, expired)

Files: rust/lichen-rpl/src/*.rs

Use typestate for DODAG membership, runtime checks for route entries.
